problem: Can ocean acidification be safely reversed — what biochemical approach?
mechanism: Biochar amendment for soil carbon sequestration
hypothesis: Can ocean acidification be safely reversed — what biochemical approach? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Biochar. Biochar amendment for soil carbon sequestration directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Sensor network monitoring with 8 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
